message:
test(obligation): add 36 leak regression E2E tests (bd-105vq)

Covers marking analysis (clean lifecycle, leak detection on region close,
multi-region, explicit leak events, stress with 1000 obligations and 100
regions), static leak checker (straight-line, branch, nested, multi-kind,
realistic patterns), graded obligations (drop bomb, scope tracking, stress),
combined cross-checker agreement, deterministic reproducibility, edge cases,
and cancellation mid-reserve scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
